snippet.title: Talia Mar - Lady (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Talia Mar - Lady (Official Video)
Listen to the new single ‘Lady.’ here: https://ffm.to/lady-jfm3

Thank you to everyone who worked on this video and helped bring the vision to life:

Credits:
Director: Talia Mar

Colour Producer: Ella Hill @ellahill.jpg

Follow Talia Mar:‬ ‪‬‬ 
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/taliamar
X - https://x.com/taliamar
TikTok - https://www.tiktok.com/@taliamar
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/TaliaMar/
Twitch - https://www.twitch.tv/taliamar

Lyrics:
I don’t wanna stand up straight 
Saying yes to every date
No is rude, a boy likes you 
You’re lucky to find someone
(They say)
Think about what’s on the plate
And don’t you dare gain the weight 
Leave the food, it’s up to you
Cause how will you meet someone?

If you’re not giving picture perfect magazine
Picked apart, start with the broken seams
I’ll teach my daughter what it means   
To be a woman

Cause what makes a lady
Is not what I’m raising
I wanna show her a world where no means no
If you wanna leave, you go
Picking yourself apart gets you nowhere but it makes you insane
to be a lady would be shame 

Careful of the words you use
It’s not ladylike to let loose
Fuck this and fuck that too
they wanna sensor you
And disguise it as politeness 
You get silenced if you fight it
And they mind it if you mind it
So it’s best to be reminded that

I’ll teach my daughter what it means 
To be a woman

Cause what makes a lady
Is not what I’m raising
I wanna show her a world where no means no
If you wanna leave, you go
Picking yourself apart gets you nowhere but it makes you insane
to be a lady would be shame

It’d be a shame to dull your voice 
It’d be a shame to not have choice 
It’d be a shame for other women
To sit and poise yourself for points
And in the end who really wins?
When you’re you’re so well spoken and slim 
And you’ve spent all your extra hours
Being a man’s perfect sim

Cause what makes a lady
Is not what I’m raising
I wanna show her a world where no means no
If you wanna leave, you go
Picking yourself apart gets you nowhere but it makes you insane
to be a lady would be shame

snippet.title: 30 Seconds of Innocence 🦋
snippet.description:
He gave her pancakes... She gave him everything 🥞🦋
A 30 Second story inspired by a real Clash Royale match.

X ► https://twitter.com/ClashRoyale/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashroyale
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashroyale
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashRoyale/

ENTER THE ARENA
Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS comes a real-time multiplayer battle game starring your favourite Clash characters and more. Start battling against players from around the world!

BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING
Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle!
Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Tower Troops from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match.

COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS
Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love and many others. Win battles and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new Cards to your collection!

BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Battle your way to the League and Global Tournaments to match against the best players in the world.
Compete for glory and rewards!

SEASONAL EVENTS
Unlock new Seasonal items like Tower Skins, Emotes and powerful Magic Items with the Season Pass and participate in fun Challenges that put your skills to the test!

JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR
Join or form a Clan with other players to share Cards and battle in Clan Wars for BIG rewards!

See you in the Arena!
#ClashRoyale

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Number One - Dunsin Oyekan ft @JohnWilds #dunsinoyekan #johnwilds
snippet.description:
Number One Love: First Love; Only Love.

This sound is a sound of commitment, a sound of decision, a love song.

Love is not a one off choice that powers itself at the beginning. It is a daily choice, a decision, a quiet determination to persist in loving the object of your affection whether the feeling is present or not, whether the demand of the sacrifice feels too weighty for the mind to comprehend.

This love is a declaration that every day we do not just choose the Lord, we prioritize Him above all.

Not because we are skilled at choosing Him,
but because our eyes have seen a love too great for words.

His love has constrained our hearts,
and daily we remind our souls to stay,
to stay put in this First Love,
this Only Love,
our Number One Love.

So Abraham rose early in the morning and saddled his donkey, and took two of his young men with him, and Isaac his son; and he split the wood for the burnt offering, and arose and went to the place of which God had told him.” Genesis 22:3 NKJV

Turn my eyes away from vanity [all those worldly, meaningless things that distract—let Your priorities be mine], And restore me [with renewed energy] in Your ways. Psalms 119:37 AMP

Track 4 on the New Wine Album (2026) https://found.ee/NewWine
